title: 3D crops Revamped
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mmSzva-6UB8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


![garden showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa94b1729b47ba9f117c0c24ca4328d0a0f6939b.png)

![Shaders supported](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a430d1ab14284edb6a09b9241f4b5f2a21aa91d_0.webp)

_Tired of your flat 2D farms? This is a light-weight resource pack that simply turns your crops into 3d blocks!_




# **Improvements 🛠️**
- fixed floating textures on certain leaves
- improved crops growth stage readability and reduced texture repetition
- colored pumpkin/melon stems
- invisible edges on models
- more plants




# **Enhanced Blocks 🌼**

- Carrots
- Beetroots
- Potatoes
- Wheat
- Melon Stem
- Pumpkin Stem
- Netherwart
- Red Mushroom
- Brown Mushroom
- Sugarcane
- Sweet Berry Bush
- Warped Fungus
- Crimson Fungus




# **Credits 🏅**

Based on the "Crops 3D" resource pack by NinthWorld. It's textured for crops, flowers and saplings.
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

[_**BAREBONES VERSION OUT NOW!**_](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/barebones-3d-crops)
